check.name: ArrayBracketWhitespace
check.description:
Checks that the whitespace around the square bracket tokens [ and ] are correct to the typical convention. The convention is not configurable.

Left square bracket ([):

  • must not be preceded by whitespace when preceded by a type or identifier.
  • must not be followed by whitespace.

Right square bracket (]):

  • must not be preceded by whitespace.
  • must be followed by whitespace, except when it is followed by: another bracket, a dot, a comma, a semicolon, postfix operators (++, --), a right parenthesis, or a method reference (::).
